title: RG21 4HG, Herriard Bio Power Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/AB3807KW/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Herriard Bio Power Limited   Installation name: Re-Gas Herriard AD Plant   Permit number: EPR/AB3807KW/V003   "
